title: Attempt to submit leave request without manager assigned
pre_conditions: Employee does not have a manager assigned in the organizational chart.
steps: Step 1: Navigate to the 'Leave Requests' section of the self-service portal.
Step 2: Select 'Annual Leave' from the leave type dropdown.
Step 5: Add an optional comment stating 'Annual leave for personal reasons'.
expected_result: The leave request submission fails, and the system shows an error message stating 'No manager assigned to process this request'.
jira_push_error: JIRA credentials not configured — set JIRA_BASE_URL, JIRA_EMAIL, JIRA_API_TOKEN in backend/.env and restart the backend.
